text.title: github-actions-cicd Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for github-actions-cicd as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Uploading node_modules/ as an artifact between jobs.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: node_modules can be hundreds of MB. Use actions/cache for dependencies; use artifacts only for build outputs (dist/, coverage/).
